title: delphinium burkei subsp. distichiflorum
intro: Delphinium burkei subsp. distichiflorum, also known as the distichous delphinium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain a range of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and glycosides. The distichous delphinium has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, with its herbal preparations offering benefits such as antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties. In addition to its medicinal uses, the plant is also used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support respiratory health and reduce inflammation.
